% --- FRONTMATTER: Title Page & Structure ---
\frontmatter

% --- Force all automatically generated blank pages to show page numbers ---
\makeatletter
\renewcommand{\cleardoublepage}{\clearpage\if@twoside \ifodd\c@page\else
    \thispagestyle{plain}% <--- Tells LaTeX to use the plain style (with page numbers) on empty spacer pages
    \hbox{}\newpage\if@twocolumn\hbox{}\newpage\fi\fi\fi}
\makeatother

% --- Custom Modern Title Page ---
\thispagestyle{empty}
\begin{center}
    \vspace*{2.5in}

    % Main Title (Dynamic)
    \makeatletter
    {\fontsize{32pt}{38pt}\selectfont \textbf{\@title}} \\[0.5cm]
    \makeatother

    % Subtitle or Description
    {\fontsize{14pt}{18pt}\selectfont \textcolor{gray}{A Comprehensive Technical Framework}} \\

    \vspace{1.5cm}
    \rule{\textwidth}{1.5pt}
    \vspace{2cm}

    % Author (Using clean, reliable macro)
    {\fontsize{18pt}{22pt}\selectfont \textbf{\authorname}} \\

    \vfill

    % Date / Version
    % {\fontsize{11pt}{14pt}\selectfont \today}

    \vfill
\end{center}
\newpage

% --- Copyright Page Placeholder (Physical Page 2 - Left Hand/Even) ---

\thispagestyle{plain}
\vspace*{\fill}

% --- Epigraph (Quote) Page (Physical Page 5 - Right Hand/Odd) ---

        \itshape
        "An expert is a person who has made all the mistakes that can be made in a very narrow field."

\end{flushright}
\newpage

% --- Empty Page After Epigraph (Physical Page 6 - Left Hand/Even) ---
\thispagestyle{plain} % <-- Changed to plain so 'vi' explicitly prints
\mbox{}
\newpage              % Passes control straight to page 7!

\mainmatter

% 3. Appendices Block

\normalsize

% --- About the Author ---
\chapter{About the Author}
\thispagestyle{plain}

\authorname, is a Senior Machine Learning Engineer and Data Scientist with an extensive background in engineering frameworks and advanced systems development. A graduate of McMaster University in Metallurgical Engineering, he specializes in high-performance computing architectures, custom automation pipelines, and robust software infrastructure.

When not structuring complex codebases or optimizing technical documentation frameworks, he is an avid cyclist focused on performance analytics and outdoor endurance. He lives with his family, continuing to build open-source tools and data utilities.

% --- Dynamic Book Index ---
\cleardoublepage
\makeatletter
% Force a hard target right inside the multi-column index page setup
\let\old@makeschapterhead\@makeschapterhead
\renewcommand{\@makeschapterhead}[1]{%
  \phantomsection% Sets the hyperlink target at absolute zero on the new page
  \addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{\indexname}% Adds it cleanly to the TOC
  \old@makeschapterhead{#1}% Draws the actual title text
}
\makeatother
\printindex

\end{document}
